dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 3496 RH: Northern Mariana Islands Small Business Access Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. King-Hinds introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Small Business
Additional sponsors: Mr. Conaway, Mr. Cisneros, and Ms. Goodlander
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on May 19, 2025

form.official-title: To amend the Small Business Act for microloan eligibility for the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Northern Mariana Islands Small Business Access Act.

section.header: Inclusion of the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands in the microloan program

subsection.text: Section 7(m)(7)(B) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 636(m)(7)(B)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by inserting , the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands after Guam each place it appears; and
in clause (i)(I)(bb), by striking 1/55 and inserting 1/56.

subsection.text: Section 7(m)(11)(C)(ii) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 636(m)(11)(C)(ii)) is amended by striking rural and all that follows through the end of the clause and inserting rural; and.

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
